const priceUsd = token.usd_price || 0
          const valueUsd = token.usd_value || 0
          
          chain.tokens.push({
            address: token.token_address,
            symbol: token.symbol,
            name: token.name,
            balance: token.balance,
            balanceFormatted: token.balance_formatted || balance.toFixed(6),
            valueUsd,
            priceUsd,
            logo: logoUrl,
          })
          
          chain.valueUsd += valueUsd
          totalValue += valueUsd
        }
      }
